reviews.review_msg: This was one of the worst courses I've taken. The lectures and explanations were often unclear and confusing, so I had to spend a lot of extra time teaching myself the material outside of class.

Really good professor, Gives exactly what she teaches in class.
gets mad sometimes and refuse to explain some concepts but overall a 10/10.
Very heavy grading, confusing at times, class is really boring as its 4h of math
She is a nice prof

She teaches you the most random thing and they don't come in your midterms or final exam, she is basically just uttering nonsense in class then study by your self. You can pass just by studying by yourself the class is pointless

She's really good, YES, You gonna have a lot of assignments, but honestly doing her assignments is the only way to succeed in this course and understand.
She is always willing to help and had 3 office hours, her exams were EASY, and she is well organised. She gets angry when the students don't do their assignments, cuz she cares.
Very nice and sweet.

She's a really nice professor, super sweet and always willing to help whenever you have any questions. Her class can be harder than some other Math100 profs in FIC so if you have a strong math background, take it with her !!! I was pretty sure that i was going to fail the class but she gave me a passing grade.

- Malcolm :)))))

Bad explanations, could've simplified it but always chooses not to. Her exam papers are WAY HARDER than other MATH100 profs. One plus point is that she gives perfect scores for home assignments (you still need to show that u finished it), though it is only 5% of your total score.
she is bad at explanation. if you ask her to help with exercises she will force another student to help you.
She speaks utterly slow, she doesn't explain good, her class is beyond boring. Dont take her, I ended up learning everything on my own with YT videos
She speaks really slow, often makes mistake and nor very good at explaining.
Her voice is hoarse. Personally, I think she is a very lazy teacher. She shows us the videos she recorded in the live class and often makes mistakes.
She is a good professor, but what she does sometimes makes people feel sick. For example, change the score ratio and suddenly increase the difficulty at the end of the semester.
If you are good at maths and devote proper time for practice, then you are gonna be just fine.
Take her

I have had Shiva for Math 105 and math 108, and she is one of the best math teachers i have ever had. Shiva is a very kind, knowledgeable , and a helpful person. She always makes time to help students and has the best advice for understanding math subjects. I would definitely recommend Shiva.
Great Math instructor
As most said her lecture notes are incredibly useful! Good teacher as she can give a lot of knowledge-you should just listen and understand
her notes is very good , working hard then you can get good mark.

Personally absolutely terrible experience in this class. Loved to publicly humiliate students and got frustrated when we didn't understand a concept. Hands down worst attitude I've ever encountered throughout university. Laughed at students' questions when they actually build up the courage to ask.
She was so helpful and welcome questions from students. I had a hard time at first trying to get along with her accent. But then it turned out to be ok as time goes by.

Pretty good teacher. Helps every time and occasionally gives good feedbacks on how to improve on certain aspects of Maths. Although, its kinda toughy to understand her accent but overall she is a pretty good maths instructor.
she's just amazing teacher. she loves her subject and is willing to make her students to love that subject too.

Average prof. Teaching ability is fine and the content is pretty easy, but she has a very poor attitude. Like others have said she is downright rude to students. Has obvious favourites and no problem bullying those she doesn't like. Enjoys publicly humiliating people.
Not a good teacher. Shiva is also I very hard marker. She's difficult to understand at times and down right rude when you ask her questions. Don't bother buying the textbook, it's never used.
She has great philosophy behind teaching math. She is very flexible and helpful. I only have good things to say about her.
She was a great prof, she explained things so well and I enjoyed her class. She made difficult math easier. I hope I get a similar prof for stats :)

Shiva is a horrible professor who should be fired from the university. I have received A's in math for my entire university career; I worked hard in this class, but because Shiva did not like me, I got a B+. Save yourself a headache and choose a different professor.

I absolutely hate math, and I hate SFU even more for making someone in Arts take this. But whatever. Shiva wasn't the best prof, but she tried her best to help us. She was really nice when you went up and asked her questions.

worst class ever! I can't believe how stupid sfu is for making you take this course. It's honestly a waste of time and money. I don't see how any of the content is helpful in life. such a b.s. university.
Shiva has no clear assessment criteria. She is an unfair marker. She needs to develop better teaching strategies and has a lot to learn about marking and teaching strategies.

Shiva, is not only a bad professor, but she seems to be a horrible person as well. Everyone has biases, but to allow them to blatantly effect your teaching practices and grading of students is disgusting. Her accent, understanding of the english, and choice of words is inadequate for this level of instruction; too much confusion.
coolest math teacher ever! she is so smart! I wish I could borrow her brain going into the exam!

This class was good because as someone who has never taken math before, I really got to understand the basics of math. She is a good teacher and knows her stuff! I do not think math 100 should have fan x99 as a prerequisite because a) so irrelevant b) B-? are u freakin kidding me? it's for people who have never taken math before! wtf!

Amazing prof! I hate math, but she made it fun! I just didn't think this course helped at all going into math 100. Two different things! I do not understand why it's a prerequisite for math 100! But Shiva made it fun regardless!

She was very nice and helpful for students who were not so good for math. Her assignments were fairly easy, and she was always available by email and office hours. I recommend her all the way she is a very nice person.

are you sure we're talking about the same women. she's probably the worst , did not understand a thing , teaching style was " you think about it , I don't know ". All she told me or helped me was tell me to think , if i knew woman , i wouldn't be in this class. only taught 3 word problem in the duration of a two hour class. quite useless.

She is awesome and very helpful and friendly! Crystal clear! there were a lot of immature idiots in our class but she was VERY patient with all of them and helped them regardless!!!!!! and she is gorgeous!
